'''jadunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacorn|seacorn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacorn|seacorn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jadunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædinith|jædinith]] || [[word:jædinij|jædinij]] || [[word:jædinish|jædinish]] || [[word:jædini|jædini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadudunuth|jadudunuth]] || [[word:jadudunuj|jadudunuj]] || [[word:jadudunush|jadudunush]] || [[word:jadudunu|jadudunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadunuth|jadunuth]] || [[word:jadunuj|jadunuj]] || [[word:jadunush|jadunush]] || [[word:jadunu|jadunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadufnuth|jadufnuth]] || [[word:jadufnuj|jadufnuj]] || [[word:jadufnush|jadufnush]] || [[word:jadufnuf|jadufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadunuthu|jadunuthu]] || [[word:jadunuju|jadunuju]] || [[word:jadunushu|jadunushu]] || [[word:jadunuku|jadunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadunuth|jadunuth]] || [[word:jadunuj|jadunuj]] || [[word:jadunush|jadunush]] || [[word:jadunu|jadunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadunuthul|jadunuthul]] || [[word:jadunujul|jadunujul]] || [[word:jadunushul|jadunushul]] || [[word:jadunukul|jadunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadunuthuthu|jadunuthuthu]] || [[word:jadunujuju|jadunujuju]] || [[word:jadunushushu|jadunushushu]] || [[word:jadunuku|jadunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadunuthun|jadunuthun]] || [[word:jadunujun|jadunujun]] || [[word:jadunushun|jadunushun]] || [[word:jadunukun|jadunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadunuthuoro|jadunuthuoro]] || [[word:jadunujuoro|jadunujuoro]] || [[word:jadunushuoro|jadunushuoro]] || [[word:jadunukuoro|jadunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
